name: astramesh-command-deck
description: AstraMesh Command Deck monorepo for operating many AI/ML projects in one shell.

scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -k -n shell,drift,llm,rag,prompt,neural,forge,interview,mlops -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow,red,white,gray,orange "npm run dev:shell" "npm --prefix ..\drift-watch\frontend run dev -- --port 5401 --host" "npm --prefix ..\llm-judge\frontend run dev -- --port 5402 --host" "npm --prefix ..\ragbench\frontend run dev -- --port 5403 --host" "npm --prefix ..\prompt-ops\frontend run dev -- --port 5404 --host" "npm --prefix ..\neuralscope\frontend run dev -- --port 5405 --host" "npm --prefix ..\config-forge\frontend run dev -- --port 5406 --host" "npm --prefix ..\interview-os\frontend run dev -- --port 5407 --host" "npm --prefix ..\mlops-sentinel\frontend run dev -- --port 5408 --host"
scripts.dev:extended: concurrently -k -n shell,drift,llm,rag,prompt,neural,forge,interview,mlops,tracer,research,agenticui -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow,red,white,gray,orange,purple,teal,greenBright "npm run dev:shell" "npm --prefix ..\drift-watch\frontend run dev -- --port 5401 --host" "npm --prefix ..\llm-judge\frontend run dev -- --port 5402 --host" "npm --prefix ..\ragbench\frontend run dev -- --port 5403 --host" "npm --prefix ..\prompt-ops\frontend run dev -- --port 5404 --host" "npm --prefix ..\neuralscope\frontend run dev -- --port 5405 --host" "npm --prefix ..\config-forge\frontend run dev -- --port 5406 --host" "npm --prefix ..\interview-os\frontend run dev -- --port 5407 --host" "npm --prefix ..\mlops-sentinel\frontend run dev -- --port 5408 --host" "npm --prefix ..\agent-tracer\frontend run dev -- --port 5409 --host" "npm --prefix ..\agentic-research-assistant\frontend run dev -- --port 5410 --host" "npm --prefix ..\agentic-ui run storybook -- --port 6006"
